torch_pattern: gathered = torch.cat(all_gather(input, dim=3, cluster_axis=cluster_axis), dim=3); out = torch.matmul(gathered, in1)
weight_transform: in1 (matmul weight) must be pre-sharded/laid out for the post-gather activation width: weight shape [K_full, N] where K_full = K_local * num_devices_along_{CLUSTER_AXIS}; no numeric transform, identity values
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: decomposition of fused op (all_gather along dim=3 across cluster_axis followed by matmul); no registered golden, inferred from op signature and test harness inputs (tt_input_tensor, tt_in1_tensor, dim=3, cluster_axis); fusion_notes: Fuses CCL all-gather with the consuming matmul; requires persistent intermediate buffers and per-iteration global semaphores rotated over num_buffers to allow async overlap.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: input gathered along dim=3 across cluster_axis (width grows by num_devices)
placement_observations.source: test: ag_memory_config=ag_output_mem_config (explicit AG output memory config passed per-call; buffer/layout not fully resolvable from snippet, default-interleaved assumed)
test: mm_memory_config=mm_output_sharded_mem_config (variable name indicates sharded output config; L1 sharding assumed from naming convention)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: fully gathered tensor size, rotated over num_buffers for async pipelining
